# llms-skills registry

> The publisher directory of the llms-txt-skills ecosystem: one searchable
> concept per registered origin, served as a verified knowledge base itself.
> Registering = one PR adding a markdown file; CI re-verifies every origin LIVE.

<!-- skills-memory: {"snapshot":"/skills-index.snapshot","snapshot_sha256":"233b378a79c09ea6ef3a30dde8626ea2f157382c710ea6caffe9ac1cbcd290d0","format":"minimemory-okf-v1"} -->

## Skills

Remote Agent Skills published by this domain.

- [search_knowledge](/skills/search_knowledge/SKILL.md): BM25 search over this origin's published knowledge bundle. Use it to find which concept answers a question before fetching it. <!-- skill: {"version":"0.1.0","license":"MIT","sha256":"a093440b30bb81abafc12014a130635b6acc22c608e2dae3914511e058fbde5e","tool":"/skills/search_knowledge/tool.js","tool_sha256":"b13a3c0448c4ee8c744b1ee33b1dd441ecc0c7c3552e23f04b5f9aaf79049ab7"} -->
- [get_concept](/skills/get_concept/SKILL.md): fetch the full markdown of a knowledge concept by id from this origin's bundle. <!-- skill: {"version":"0.1.0","license":"MIT","sha256":"c63b95427c4888b215b476442044d0e8ceeb9e4bd7e15eac7d762c9754988655","tool":"/skills/get_concept/tool.js","tool_sha256":"8af087d9bbfdaa9b97d3a0bd81ee7be7990c52eb5142b96317f21453009e2ca0"} -->
- [list_concepts](/skills/list_concepts/SKILL.md): list every knowledge concept this origin publishes (id, type, title, description). <!-- skill: {"version":"0.1.0","license":"MIT","sha256":"3576ada3394b026b552620b009c8b3d6690995778d0cb63c4ca32fe78e793c19","tool":"/skills/list_concepts/tool.js","tool_sha256":"0368ca026ffc2c7d7979b2c66a89b446f6a0d4038ffbb196505fb60aee9845da"} -->
